flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Alabama A & M University fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (28.1% → 24.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Alabama A & M University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Alabama A & M University are 46% above 6-year earnings ($27.9k → $40.6k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Alabama A & M University rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 (58.0% → 69.9%).
